title: Lentiviral transduction
steps: Plate neurons in a dish at days in vitro (DIV) 0
At DIV=1 infect neurons with lentiviral particles at MOI=9
When neurons are mature (DIV>=6), remove media containing virus, and treat neurons based on experimental needs
Post treatment lyse samples in lysis buffer to be used for western blotting later
creator: Bishal Basak
